javadoc_before: /** * Substitutes value for the most recently added value. * Returns the value that has been replaced. If the array is empty (i.e. * if {@link #numElements} is zero), a MathRuntimeException is thrown. * * @param value new value to substitute for the most recently added value * @return value that has been replaced in the array * @since 2.0 */
javadoc_after: /** * Substitutes value for the most recently added value. * Returns the value that has been replaced. If the array is empty (i.e. * if {@link #numElements} is zero), an IllegalStateException is thrown. * * @param value new value to substitute for the most recently added value * @return value that has been replaced in the array * @throws IllegalStateException if the array is empty * @since 2.0 */
